term: on the edge of one's seat
englishDefinitions: Very excited, nervous, or eager to know what will happen next.
persianTranslation: از شدت هیجان یا اضطراب لحظه‌شماری کردن
examples: The final minutes of the game had everyone on the edge of their seats.
I was on the edge of my seat waiting for the results.
The novel keeps you on the edge of your seat until the end.
